abilities.description: Create a 1/1 white Soldier creature token.
Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying until your next turn.

effect.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control. Those creatures gain flying until your next turn.
effect.name: PutCounterAll

abilities.description: Destroy target creature an opponent controls with mana value 3 or greater.
abilities.target_prompt: Select target creature an opponent controls with mana value 3 or greater

replacements.description: If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead.
